app_info.subtitle: Read campaign lore
app_info.description: MyArchivist lets users browse their tabletop campaign data in ChatGPT, including campaigns, characters, sessions, story beats, moments, factions, locations, items, quests, journals, journal folders, and entity links.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves the caller's campaign list from MyArchivist and does not modify data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves one MyArchivist campaign by ID and does not modify data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change public internet state.

test_cases.description: List available campaigns for the authenticated user.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a paginated list of campaigns with titles and summary metadata.
Returns counts and other available statistics for the requested campaign.

test_cases.description: Find approved player characters in a campaign.
test_cases.user_prompt: List approved PC characters in campaign camp_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching character records and preserves the requested filters.

test_cases.description: Retrieve a session with related story context.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open session sess_123 and include related beats and moments.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the requested session details with related beats and moments when available.

test_cases.description: Review a campaign's quest list by status.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show in-progress quests for campaign camp_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns in-progress quests for the campaign with pagination metadata.

test_cases.user_prompt: Get quest quest_123 with its objectives and progress log.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the expanded quest record, including objectives, progress, related entities, and session provenance when available.

test_cases.user_prompt: List journal entries for campaign camp_123, then open entry journal_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns visible journal entries, then the requested journal content and permission metadata.

test_cases.user_prompt: List links from character char_123 in campaign camp_123.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relationship links that match the requested source entity filter.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for creating or editing campaign content.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new quest in MyArchivist called The Broken Crown.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because this MCP server only supports read-only campaign access.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar data is outside its supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general tabletop advice without campaign data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Give me five tips for running a better combat encounter.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request does not need MyArchivist campaign records.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for external publishing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Post my latest session summary to Discord.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot send messages or publish content to external services.
